title: [DO NOT MERGE] Test c/image #2907
body:
Do a quick vendor test of c/image with a proposed PR for cherry picking into c/image v5.35.*.

Proposed PR: https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2907

comments.body: @mtrmac got it, I think!  I just cherry picked that change in c/image into the release-5.36 branch there.  I'll vendor that into here.
@mtrmac I have vendored from https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2913/commits/40d10270ef5ead65fb0ddc84bb1dbdae8c237a60 this time.  Fingers crossed!
@TomSweeneyRedHat this is a solid proof that https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2913 doesn’t _hurt_, but it changes ~nothing in the Skopeo repo.
